target: LICHEN-LLM: obligately co-trained dual-model pair with specialist embedded in generalist residual stream; neither functions standalone

results.title: Lichen — Wikipedia
results.rationale: Source-domain biology page about lichens, not an LLM mechanism. No keyword overlap with LLM-side content words; no functional similarity to co-trained dual-model architecture.

results.title: Speculative Decoding with Draft Model (2023/2)
results.rationale: Speculative decoding uses a small draft + large verifier but they are NOT obligately co-trained, NOT embedded in residual stream, and BOTH can function standalone. Speculative pattern explicitly disclaimed in novelty_claim. Func mid-range per calibration for speculative (0.5-0.65).

results.title: Speculative Sampling (2023/5)
results.rationale: Same speculative paradigm — parallel draft model for acceleration. Models independent, not obligate, not residual-embedded. Disclaimed pattern. Func at speculative calibration range.

results.title: Routing-Based Cascading LLM (2025/4)
results.rationale: Cascading routes between models of different sizes; models operate independently (one at a time), not obligately co-trained nor residual-stream embedded. Disclaimed in novelty_claim. Func at cascading calibration (0.5-0.65).

results.title: Coupled Auxiliary Network Embedded in Transformer Residual (2025/9)
results.rationale: Auxiliary network embedded in transformer residual at multiple layers + jointly trained with main model. Strong match to LICHEN-LLM's residual-stream embedding + co-training. Func at calibration 0.8-0.9.

results.title: Obligately Co-Trained Dual-Model Inference (2026/3)
results.rationale: Direct match: 'two models trained as obligate inference pair; main model factual layers replaced by auxiliary model outputs.' Captures obligate co-training + factual-vs-structural split. Func at top calibration 0.9-0.95.

results.title: Tightly-Coupled Specialist Embedding via Residual Stream (2025/11)
results.rationale: Specialist model embedded in generalist residual stream — nearly verbatim match to LICHEN-LLM's mechanism. Tightly-coupled implies obligate-style dependence. Func at calibration 0.85-0.9.

results.title: Composite Two-Model Architecture for Domain-Specialist LLM (2026/4)
results.rationale: Composite generalist + domain-specialist where both required at inference — matches cannot-function-standalone duo aspect. Does not explicitly state residual-stream embedding. Func at calibration 0.7-0.8.

summary.verdict: NOVELTY DEFEATED — 4 strong functional matches (ranks 5-8) demonstrate prior art covering obligately co-trained dual-model architectures with residual-stream embedding. Rank 6 is a direct match (func 0.92). Speculative/cascading priors (ranks 2-4) are mechanistically distinct as disclaimed.
